azure-devops._note: Provides work item read/write, PR context, and AC resolution. Required for /generate-user-stories, /review-acceptance-criteria, /review-pr-readiness, and /generate-traceability-matrix to pull live ADO data rather than asking the developer to paste.

github._note: Provides PR diff, branch, and repo context. Required when vcs.type = github in .dev-iq/config.yaml.

filesystem._note: Gives the agent explicit read access to the workspace file tree. Enables /explain-code and /blast-radius-estimator to traverse the repo structure without relying on diff context alone.

_setup: See .vscode/MCP.md for step-by-step credential setup and troubleshooting for each server.

_disabled_servers._note: The servers below are pre-configured but disabled. To enable one, move it into mcpServers above and supply the required credentials.

jira._note: Use instead of azure-devops when tracker.type = jira in .dev-iq/config.yaml.

git._note: Provides git log, blame, and diff access. Useful for /blast-radius-estimator and /generate-release-notes on repos with complex history.

sentry._note: Provides recent error events for /debug-issue. Enables the agent to correlate a bug report with live Sentry errors before diagnosing.
